data.title: ADX Energy Plans Webinar to Outline European Gas Strategy and Exploration Results
data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from ADX Energy ( (AU:ADX) ) is now available.

ADX Energy has scheduled a shareholder webinar to provide a corporate update and strategic outlook, highlighting its positioning within the changing European gas market. The event aims to brief investors on how the company is aligning its operations with regional gas demand and market developments.

Management will present results from the recent Welchau-1 well testing program and ongoing technical work on the discovery, as well as outline the HOCH-1 prospect and the broader shallow gas play in Upper Austria. These updates are intended to inform shareholders about the potential impact of recent exploration outcomes on ADX Energy’s growth prospects and regional gas portfolio.

More about ADX Energy

ADX Energy is an ASX-listed European-focused energy producer and explorer, with activities centered on gas assets in regions such as the Vienna Basin and Upper Austria. The company targets opportunities in the evolving European gas market, positioning its portfolio to benefit from regional energy dynamics and demand for secure gas supply.

Average Trading Volume: 2,793,413

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$28.62M

data.title: N1 Holdings lifts revenue, profit and lending capacity on record settlements
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

N1 Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:N1H) ) just unveiled an announcement.

N1 Holdings reported strong March-quarter results, with record settlement volumes and a solid uplift in revenue and profitability despite higher interest rates and geopolitical uncertainty. The company’s SME lending business remained its core earnings driver, supported by disciplined cost control, strict lending criteria and stable operational expenses.

For the nine months to 31 March 2026, unaudited revenue rose 8.87% to $15.96 million and pre-tax profit reached about $1.35 million, while quarterly gross revenue increased 19.6% year on year and cash receipts from customers more than doubled. Management highlighted that underlying operating cash flow was positive after adjusting for lending-related cash movements, as N1 expanded funding capacity to about $352 million and broadened distribution via new channels such as a white-label program and AI-led efficiency initiatives.

More about N1 Holdings Ltd.

N1 Holdings Limited is an Australian property-backed private credit lender focused on the SME sector, offering loans secured against established Australian properties with no construction lending exposure. The group is funded through balance sheet capital, N1-managed mortgage funds, and various debt and warehouse facilities, and positions itself as a preferred private debt asset manager for high-net-worth individuals, family offices, and institutions.

Average Trading Volume: 35,901

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: A$8.81M

data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Promisia Healthcare Limited ( (NZ:PHL) ) is now available.

Promisia Healthcare Limited has issued 50,000 new ordinary shares following the conversion of an equivalent number of unquoted restricted share units under its 2023 Senior Executive Restricted Share Unit Plan. The issue, priced at a volume-weighted average price of $0.4663 per share and fully paid via services rendered, represents about 0.095% of shares on issue, with 10,000 RSUs cancelled and total ordinary shares now standing at 52,804,550.

A related disclosure notice shows that Chief Financial Officer Francisco Rodriguez Ferrere increased his holding from 60,000 to 146,600 Promisia shares through two RSU conversions, including the latest 50,000-share issuance. The transactions, conducted outside closed trading periods, underscore the company’s ongoing use of equity-based incentives to align senior management interests with those of shareholders.

More about Promisia Healthcare Limited

Promisia Healthcare Limited is a New Zealand-listed healthcare company operating under the ticker PHL. It issues ordinary shares and uses senior executive restricted share unit (RSU) schemes as part of its remuneration and incentive structures for key management staff.

data.title: Clime Capital Lifts NTA, Maintains High Yields and Active Buyback Amid Volatile Market
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Clime Capital Limited ( (AU:CAM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Clime Capital reported an estimated unaudited mid-month pre-tax net tangible assets of 81 cents per share as at 22 April 2026, rising to about 83.5 cents post-tax, with a gross portfolio value of roughly $155.4 million after its March quarter dividend payment. The portfolio has performed solidly in April, supported by high cash holdings of more than $22 million and yield investments in debt and credit markets, as the manager gradually deploys liquidity and adds to equity positions on market weakness.

The company declared a March quarter dividend of 1.35 cents per share, 65% franked, to be paid on 24 April 2026, implying an estimated gross annual yield of around 9.2% based on the current CAM share price, while its CAMG notes yield 6.5% on the $1.00 issue price. Clime Capital is also running an active on-market buyback, having repurchased and cancelled about $0.39 million of CAM shares and CAMG notes since 1 April 2026, and is positioning its portfolio defensively against a potential stagflation environment while planning in-person shareholder and investor updates across major Australian cities in May.

More about Clime Capital Limited

Clime Capital Limited is an Australian listed investment company focused on managing a diversified portfolio of equities and income-yielding securities for investors. The company emphasizes capital preservation and income generation through allocations to major Australian blue-chip stocks, high cash positions and investments in debt and credit markets, including listed and unlisted securities.

data.title: Imagion Biosystems advances MagSense breast cancer trial toward U.S. Phase 2 start
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Imagion Biosystems Ltd. ( (AU:IBX) ) has shared an update.

Imagion Biosystems has submitted its first Investigational New Drug application to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for a Phase 2 clinical trial of its MagSense imaging agent in HER2-positive breast cancer patients. The company has completed engagement with four U.S. clinical sites, progressed contract negotiations, and advanced manufacturing preparations so the study can start quickly once the IND is approved, which is anticipated in the second quarter of 2026.

The planned Phase 2 trial will evaluate safety, dosing, imaging schedule and diagnostic performance across a three-part design, and is expected to conclude 18 to 24 months after IND acceptance. Results are intended not only to validate MagSense in detecting nodal metastases and inform its clinical and economic value, but also to generate quantitative imaging data to support AI diagnostic tools, while an amended convertible note with Mercer Street provides an additional $300,000 and extended maturities to help fund these activities.

More about Imagion Biosystems Ltd.

Imagion Biosystems Ltd. is an Australian medical technology company focused on improving cancer care through early detection using its proprietary MagSense imaging technology. The company is developing targeted imaging agents, with a primary focus on HER2-positive breast cancer, and is advancing its products through clinical trials to support regulatory approval and potential commercialization in oncology diagnostics.

Average Trading Volume: 1,744,631

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: A$10.3M

The latest update is out from Marlin Global Ltd. ( (NZ:MLN) ).

Marlin Global Ltd., an NZX-listed investment company investing in offshore growth stocks, reported an unaudited net asset value of $0.8513 per share as at 21 April 2026, up from $0.8469 a week earlier. The share price closed at $0.8650, representing a 2% premium to NAV, with no impact from treasury stock as there are currently no shares held under its buyback programme.

The portfolio remains heavily weighted toward major U.S. technology and payments names, with Amazon and Microsoft each at 8%, Meta Platforms at 6%, and Mastercard and Nvidia at 5% apiece. The latest disclosure underscores Marlin Global’s continued reliance on large-cap global growth leaders to drive returns for investors, highlighting its concentrated exposure to high-profile tech and digital economy franchises.

More about Marlin Global Ltd.

Marlin Global Ltd. is a New Zealand-listed investment company focused on growth companies based outside New Zealand and Australia. Managed by specialist firm Fisher Funds, it aims to deliver competitive returns via capital growth and dividends, giving investors tax-efficient access to a diversified international portfolio listed on global exchanges or in select unlisted offshore companies.

data.title: Barys Resources Secures First Kazakh Gold Exploration Licence in North Balkhash Region
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kopore Metals Ltd ( (AU:BRY) ) has provided an update.

Barys Resources has secured its first exploration licence in Kazakhstan, covering 165 square kilometres in the North Balkhash region, a volcanic and intrusive rock terrain considered highly prospective for epithermal gold mineralisation. The licence area lies close to existing gold mines in a jurisdiction with a mining code modelled on Western Australia and a government supportive of foreign investment.

The company’s move into Kazakhstan follows a six-month, countrywide reconnaissance program that drew on extensive Soviet-era geological data and modern modelling and geophysical tools to select targets. Management says its experienced technical team and the region’s favourable geology, infrastructure and flat topography position Barys to pursue cost-effective exploration and potential future gold discoveries in a globally significant yet underexplored gold province.

More about Kopore Metals Ltd

Barys Resources Ltd is an ASX-listed exploration company focused on gold, operating through its 100% owned Kazakhstan subsidiary Steppe Rock Resources Ltd. The company targets epithermal gold mineralisation in geologically prospective regions, leveraging extensive geological databases and modern exploration techniques to identify new gold deposits in underexplored terrains.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$5.28M

The latest update is out from Woodside Energy Group ( (AU:WDS) ).

Woodside Energy Group has released an announcement noting that chair Richard Goyder and chief executive Liz Westcott have delivered their addresses to the company’s annual general meeting. The company confirmed the AGM speeches have been lodged with the market in line with listing rule requirements and formally approved by its disclosure committee.

The release is largely procedural, emphasizing compliance with regulatory obligations around timely and transparent disclosure rather than unveiling new strategic initiatives. It also reiterates that the AGM materials may contain forward-looking statements subject to significant risks and uncertainties, underscoring that investors should not rely on such statements as guarantees of future performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:WDS) stock is a Hold with a A$30.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Woodside Energy Group stock, see the AU:WDS Stock Forecast page.

More about Woodside Energy Group

Woodside Energy Group is a Perth-based energy company listed in both Australia and the United States, operating in the oil and gas sector. The group focuses on exploration, development and production of energy resources, supplying global markets with LNG and related products while engaging with investors and media through regular market disclosures.

data.title: Ju Teng Halts Hong Kong Trading Pending Takeover Code Announcement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ju Teng International Holdings Limited ( (HK:3336) ) has shared an update.

Ju Teng International Holdings Limited requested a halt in trading of its shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange from 9:00 a.m. on 23 April 2026. The company is led by chairman and CEO Cheng Li-Yu and governed by a board that includes executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors.

The trading halt was imposed pending the release of an announcement relating to Hong Kong’s Code on Takeovers and Mergers and Share Buy-backs, which will contain inside information. The move signals that a potential corporate action involving a takeover, merger or share buy-back is under consideration, and investors are awaiting further clarification on the transaction’s scope and impact.

More about Ju Teng International Holdings Limited

Ju Teng International Holdings Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 3336. It is overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors, with Cheng Li-Yu serving as chairman and chief executive officer.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
